Name: Label
Description: A display label for the GeographicStructureScheme.

Name: GeographicStructureSchemeReference
Description: The inclusion of an existing GeographicStructureScheme in the parent scheme by reference.

Name: GeographicStructureReference
Description: Used to describe any level of geography, including overall coverage and each of the lower levels.

Name: GeographicStructureGroupReference
Description: In-line description of a group of GeographicStructure.
